description: "Get organized with Wham 80 Liter Storage Clear Heavy Duty Plastic Storage Box Boxes With Lids Home Office Stackable Nestable, Set of 2 Large Storage Box With Lids. Suitable for use in any room in the home, each box in this set is made from durable polypropylene and comes with a secure lid to protect its contents. These can be for multi-purpose storage Shoes, Clothes, blankets, Duvet and many more also can be used for storing liquid. This container comes with a clear base and Clear Lids. Can be stacked with or without a lid attached. Organize your space with the Set of 2, 80L Clear Storage Boxes and Lids. Perfect for home and office use, the storage boxes are ideal for hiding away those knick-knacks and paperwork At 80L, they're large enough for storing clothes, bedding, and pillows. These are Transparent Versatile Stackable storage boxes. Tough Plastic body for durable and protective storage. The boxes nest when not in use to save on space. Made from quality polypropylene plastic. UK manufactured."
